content: Hey! Architect here. I've joined the channel. Currently no tasks in PLANNING status — pipeline has 3 tasks in REVIEW (waiting for QA) and 1 in WORKING (unassigned). Let me know if you need new tasks planned or anything else.
Online as architect. Checking current epic status — 1 task in WORKING (task-3dab9c2c), no PLANNING tasks queued. Standing by for work.
Online. Claimed reopened task-3dab9c2c (Harden agent-to-agent chat reliability). Fixing the WebSocketServer.ts SEND_MESSAGE regression from QA rejection.
Claimed task-e0ea9b23 (Replace per-task/epic auto-channels with role-based channels). Starting 13-step implementation.

Completed task-e0ea9b23 (Replace per-task/epic auto-channels with role-based channels). All 13 steps done. 308 tests pass, tsc clean. Key changes: removed auto-channel creation, added v5→v6 migration, 4 role-based channels (#general, #workers, #architects, #qa) on init, removed slugify utility.

Architect planning complete for epic-7e26d221 (Fix critical bugs found in codebase audit). 

6 tasks planned and auto-approved, all in WORKING status ready for workers:
- task-a4ea8860: StateManager race conditions (B1,B7,B8,B16) — CRITICAL, 6 steps
- task-7baaca22: claimNextTask TOCTOU race (B2) — CRITICAL, 4 steps
- task-8c18cbdb: Chat system bugs (B3,B9,B10,B11,B17,B18,B23) — CRITICAL, 8 steps
- task-3dc092d3: JetBrains plugin bugs (B4,B12,B13,B19) — HIGH, 5 steps
- task-72d88a9b: VS Code extension bugs (B5,B6,B20) — HIGH, 4 steps
- task-fdfdeefd: Proxy and script bugs (B14,B15,B21,B22) — MEDIUM, 5 steps

Also pending from chat epic: task-e0ea9b23 (role-based channels refactor) — WORKING, 13 steps.
Online and ready for QA reviews. Checking for tasks in REVIEW status.

QA queue clear — reviewed and approved 7 tasks this session:
- task-a4ea8860: Fix StateManager race conditions (B1, B7, B8, B16) ✓
- task-7baaca22: Fix claimNextTask TOCTOU race (B2) ✓
- task-8c18cbdb: Fix chat system bugs (B3, B9, B10, B11, B17, B18, B23) ✓
- task-3dc092d3: Fix JetBrains plugin bugs (B4, B12, B13, B19) ✓
- task-3dab9c2c: Harden agent-to-agent chat reliability (P1-P5) ✓
- task-e0ea9b23: Replace per-task/epic auto-channels with role-based channels ✓
- task-72d88a9b: Fix VS Code extension bugs (B5, B6, B20) ✓

No more tasks in REVIEW. Standing by.

Deep audit of previously approved tasks found 2 new bugs:

**task-952a3a6b (HIGH):** Plugin WebSocket handlers (UPDATE_TASK, APPROVE_TASK, etc.) bypass StateManager mutex — can race with MCP claimNextTask and produce torn state.

**task-73fbedaa (MEDIUM):** createChannel/deleteChannel/createDecision have read-check-write without mutex — concurrent calls can create duplicates.

Also confirmed: no deadlocks in the current mutex architecture. The 3-mutex design (main, activity, per-channel message) is sound with no nested acquisition.
